data: 6 generators (A-F), load options 400/600/700 MW; 3 scales tested: 2x2 (4q), 3x2 (6q), 4x2 (8q)
method: Brute-force enumeration of all 2^n bitstrings with feasibility check (load balance)
limitations: Brute-force is the exact ground truth for the given QUBO; deterministic (no seed needed). Exponential cost 2^n limits this baseline to n<=20 qubits in practice (here n<=8). Fuel cost computed as F=a+b*P+c*P^2 with economic dispatch (proportional load split among ON units).
